description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular industrial building with a predominantly white exterior and a flat roof. The facade features multiple large, grid-like windows and several wide garage doors, suggesting access for vehicles or loading equipment. A prominent concrete apron extends from the front, providing space for loading and unloading, while a curved, stone-textured area at the rear hints at a possible service or delivery zone. The structure includes a mix of materials, with sections of dark brick or stone and lighter concrete, giving it a utilitarian yet modern appearance. The roof is flat with visible skylights or light wells, enhancing interior illumination. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on accessibility and durability.
description: A large, modern warehouse with a flat roof, grid windows, and a mix of white concrete and dark brick materials, featuring wide garage doors and a spacious loading area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with wide garage doors, large grid windows, and a concrete loading apron.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a curved, stone-textured area and the back of the building with fewer windows and a solid wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, flat roof with skylights, and the transition between white and dark materials.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid, windowless wall and the dark brick or stone section adjacent to the main structure.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a series of large, grid-patterned windows and multiple wide garage doors set in a white concrete wall, with a broad concrete apron in front for vehicle access. The design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on accessibility.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and expansive, with several rectangular skylights or light wells visible, constructed from concrete and possibly steel supports, providing both durability and natural lighting.
